title: EDU FM Drum — Board 1 (VCOs + Waveshaper)
notes: Board 1: DA1 (TL074) with both VCOs, carrier CV mixer, waveshaper, impact distortion, pitch envelope. Inter-board: ACC_TRIG, UNACC_TRIG, SINE_OUT, CAR_SCH_OUT, MOD_SCH_OUT, MOD_INT_OUT arrive/depart via jumper pads at board edges.
_challenges: DA1 is 14-pin DIP spanning 7 rows (4-10). Carrier on left pins, modulator on right.
R15 (68K) spans rows 4→9 left (carrier integrator out to schmitt in) — long span.
Q1/Q3 (VCO oscillation NPNs) need collector wires back to integrator(-) pins — 5+ row spans.
VCO resets (Q2/Q4) need base connections from trigger bus (inter-board) plus bridges across integrator caps.
Pitch envelope connects to carrier CV mixer — needs clear routing from lower rows to mixer area.
Carrier CV mixer (rows 15-17) aggregates tune pot, pitch env, and modulator — high fanout node.

stages.name: ICs + Power
stages.desc: Install DA1 (TL074 normal orientation) and decoupling caps.
stages.test: Verify +12V on DA1 pin 4, -12V on pin 11.

stages.name: Carrier VCO
stages.desc: Integrator (DA1-A) + schmitt trigger (DA1-B) with NPN current switch.
stages.test: Apply CV to row 1L. Triangle on pin 1, square on pin 7.

stages.name: Carrier VCO Reset
stages.desc: NPN bridges integrator cap on trigger for consistent attack.
stages.test: Trigger should reset carrier waveform phase.

stages.name: Modulator VCO
stages.desc: Clone of carrier with 2.2nF cap (lower freq) and 100K hysteresis (wider thresholds).
stages.test: Apply CV to row 1R. Triangle on pin 8, square on pin 14.

stages.name: Carrier CV Mixer
stages.desc: Passive mixer: tune pot + pitch env + modulator → CARRIER_CV.

stages.name: Waveshaper
stages.desc: Anti-parallel diodes shape carrier triangle into approx sine.

stages.name: Impact Distortion
stages.desc: NPN bridges waveshaper 10K on accented hits for sharp attack.

stages.name: Added Click
stages.desc: Trigger injection via diode + 39K adds initial click.
stages.test: Click at start of each hit.

stages.name: Pitch Envelope
stages.desc: 470Ω/470nF pitch envelope with tune decay pot control.

ics._note: Normal orientation. Pin 4 (VCC) row 7 left, pin 11 (VEE) row 7 right. Carrier VCO on left pins (A: 1-3, B: 5-7), Modulator on right pins (C: 8-10, D: 12-14).

twoPins._note: DA1 VCC decoupling, pin 4 row 7L → row 8 (even=+12V via pwrL)
DA1 VEE decoupling, pin 11 row 7R → row 8 (even=-12V via pwrR)
Bulk +12V bypass. Electrolytic, +leg to row 2 col b (connect to pwrL even row)
Carrier integrator feedback cap. Pin 1 (out, row 4) ↔ pin 2 (inv, row 5)
CARRIER_CV (row 1L) → integrator inv (pin 2, row 5L)
CARRIER_CV (row 1L) → integrator non-inv (pin 3, row 6L)
Integrator non-inv (pin 3, row 6L) → GND bus (row 3L)
CAR_INT_OUT (pin 1, row 4L) → CAR_SCH_INV (pin 6, row 9L). 5-row span.
CAR_SCH_OUT (pin 7, row 10L) → CAR_SCH_NINV (pin 5, row 8L). Schmitt + feedback.
CAR_SCH_OUT (row 10L) → Q1 base (row 12L). NPN base resistor.
Modulator integrator cap. Pin 9 (inv, row 9R) ↔ pin 8 (out, row 10R)
MOD_CV (row 1R) → mod integrator inv (pin 9, row 9R). Long span.
MOD_CV (row 1R) → mod integrator non-inv (pin 10, row 8R)
Mod integrator non-inv (row 8R) → GND bus (row 3R)
MOD_INT_OUT (pin 8, row 10R) → mod schmitt inv (pin 13, row 5R). 5-row span, 100K (wider thresholds).
MOD_SCH_OUT (pin 14, row 4R) → mod schmitt non-inv (pin 12, row 6R). Feedback.
MOD_SCH_OUT (row 4R) → Q3 base (row 13R). NPN base resistor.
Trigger bus → Q2 base. VCO reset bias. TRIG from inter-board.
Bridge resistor across C2 via Q2. Q2 C/E at row 14.
Trigger bus → Q4 base. Modulator VCO reset bias.
Bridge resistor across C6 via Q4. Q4 C/E at row 15.
VCC → tune carrier pot top. Limits max tune voltage to ~9V. Row 16L pwrL=+12V(even).
Tune pot wiper (row 17, JPS) → CARRIER_CV (row 1L). Long span.
FM_SW_COM (row 18L, inter-board) → CARRIER_CV (row 1). FM modulator coupling.
GND (row 3, anode) → CARRIER_CV (row 1, cathode). Clamp prevents negative CV.
CAR_INT_OUT (row 4L) → waveshaper node (row 20L). Input scaling.
Anti-parallel diode pair at waveshaper node.
Reverse of D5 (anti-parallel).
Waveshaper node → GND (row 21 odd=GND). Diode bias.
ACC_TRIG (row 22, inter-board) → C5 (row 23). Impact trigger.
Impact distortion envelope cap.
Impact envelope node → GND (row 25 odd=GND). Discharge.
VCC (row 26 even=+12V via pwrL) → Q6 collector. NPN pull-up.
UNACC_TRIG (row 27, inter-board, anode) → click node (row 28, cathode).
Click node → SINE_OUT (waveshaper node row 20). 8-row span.
UNACC_TRIG bus (row 29) → D2 anode. Pitch charge series.
Charge diode → PITCH_CAP node (row 31).
PITCH_CAP (row 31) to GND. Film cap.
PITCH_CAP → GND via tune decay pot. Min discharge.
PITCH_CAP (anode) → PITCH_OUT (row 32, cathode). Output isolation.
PITCH_OUT → tune depth pot path (row 34). Mixer resistor.

transistors._note: Carrier VCO oscillation NPN. E→GND, B←R17 from schmitt out (row 10L), C→CAR_INT_INV (row 5L, needs jumper).
Carrier VCO reset. E→row 5L (INT_INV side of C2), C→row 4L (INT_OUT side of C2), B←R20 (1M from trigger).
Modulator VCO oscillation NPN. E→GND, B←R27 from mod schmitt (row 4R), C→MOD_INT_INV (row 9R, needs jumper).
Modulator VCO reset. Bridges C6 on trigger.
Impact distortion. B←impact env (row 24), C→waveshaper 10K input side, E→INT_OUT side. Bridges R34.

jumpers.label: Q1.C → INT_INV
jumpers._note: Q1 collector to carrier integrator inverting input (pin 2, row 5L)

jumpers.label: Q2.C → INT_OUT
jumpers._note: Q2 collector to carrier INT_OUT side of C2 (row 4L)

jumpers.label: Q2.E → INT_INV
jumpers._note: Q2 emitter to INT_INV side of C2 (row 5L)

jumpers.label: Q3.C → MOD_INT_INV
jumpers._note: Q3 collector to mod integrator inv (pin 9, row 9R)

jumpers.label: Q4.C → MOD_INT_OUT
jumpers._note: Q4 collector to MOD_INT_OUT side of C6 (row 10R)

jumpers.label: Q4.E → MOD_INT_INV
jumpers._note: Q4 emitter to MOD_INT_INV side of C6 (row 9R)

jumpers.label: SINE_OUT
jumpers._note: Sine wave output to board 2 VCA

jumpers.label: CAR_SQ out
jumpers._note: Carrier square wave to board 2 XOR gate

jumpers.label: MOD_SQ out
jumpers._note: Modulator square wave to board 2 XOR gate

jumpers.label: MOD_TRI → FM
jumpers._note: Modulator triangle to FM switch path (row 18)

powerWires.label: GND bus L
powerWires._note: Row 3 GND bus left → pwrL row 3 (odd=GND)

powerWires.label: GND bus R
powerWires._note: Row 3 GND bus right → pwrR row 3 (odd=GND)

powerWires.label: WS GND
powerWires._note: Waveshaper R38 GND end → pwrL row 21 (odd=GND)
